title: Department of Sports Management - Message from the Head of the Department
content:
Department of Sports Management - Message from the Head of the Department

Dear Student Candidates,

Sports managers, in the light of contemporary management principles and methods, are sensitive to social problems, able to produce solutions to field-related problems with a scientific method, take charge in the administration and management of sports services and activities with various titles, and can carry out works that will lead sports organizations to success in line with their establishment goals, are proactive, self-confident, They are competent and responsible persons with high communication skills. Within this authority, they fulfill their responsibilities by using the available resources (money, time, space, material, personnel) in the most rational way within the framework of the principles that constitute the management mechanism.

The Department of Sports Management, with its expert academic staff, makes every effort to raise individuals who have the ability to manage and direct, enjoy working as a team, have social responsibility, can produce projects and solutions, act with ethical values, and transfer the sports culture blended with the philosophy of Olympism to future generations and society. has equipment.

We aim to support you with a versatile, qualified and international education that will adapt to different business areas in the global world. In our department, education and training are given mainly on basic subjects such as sports management and organization, sports management, sports marketing, sports psychology, sports sociology, public relations and communication in sports management, human resources in sports businesses, leadership in sports, total quality management in sports.

Individuals who graduated from the Department of Sports Management can work in sports-related institutions and organizations in the public and private sectors, especially in the Ministry of Youth and Sports, in sports clubs in amateur and professional leagues, in provincial and district directorates affiliated to the General Directorate of Sports Services, in all kinds of sports facilities of public and private institutions. They can work in sports training centers, private sports courses and universities as academicians.

As much as he loves sports; “Leader Sports Manager” candidates who can apply organizations, total quality management, strategy and management science in practice; We invite you to learn, discuss, work and “Make a Difference” together with the leading and respected experts in this field.

“All Dreams Can Come True if You Have the Courage to Follow them."

This content was updated on 30/01/2026.
